description: A tool, software, or application used in media content creation, editing, analytics, or design

name.description: Name of the tool, e.g. 剪映, Final Cut Pro, Canva, 飞瓜数据

tool_type.description: Category of the tool: editor (video/image editor), analytics (data analysis), design (graphic design), scheduling (content planning), management (account management), production (production software)

platform.description: Supported operating system or platform, e.g. 网页端, iOS, Android, Windows, macOS

pricing_model.description: Pricing model, e.g. 免费, Freemium, 订阅制, 买断制

features.description: List of key features or capabilities of the tool
